name: Star Seraph Sovereignty
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光天使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホーリー・ライトニング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スローネ
desc: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except for an Xyz Summon that uses 3 or more monsters as material. If you Normal or Special Summon a "Star Seraph" monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon it if it is a "Star Seraph" monster.
mnst_eff: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except for an Xyz Summon that uses 3 or more monsters as material. If you Normal or Special Summon a "Star Seraph" monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon it if it is a "Star Seraph" monster.
eff: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except for an Xyz Summon that uses 3 or more monsters as material. If you Normal or Special Summon a "Star Seraph" monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon it if it is a "Star Seraph" monster.

summoning: Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
Special Summons itself from your hand
